babyDevelopment: The'C' shape of the embryo is more pronounced. Tiny buds are emerging that will become arms and legs. The eyes are beginning to form, and the optic vesicles are visible. The jaw and chin are also starting to develop.
bodyChanges: You might feel extremely tired as your body increases blood production. Breast soreness usually intensifies. Sensitivity to certain smells (parosmia) can trigger intense nausea. Some women experience mild bloating or gas.
tips: Schedule your first ultrasound for between weeks 7-10
Keep up with dental hygiene as gums can become sensitive

do: Graze on small, bland snacks to keep nausea at bay
Stay hydrated (aim for pale yellow urine)
Start a pregnancy journal to track your feelings
dont: Worry about a small amount of weight loss if nauseous

travelAdvisory.note: Travel is safe; carry ginger candies for motion sickness.

milestoneDescription: Your baby is starting to grow limbs and facial features.
